shot.composition: rule-of-thirds sequence starting medium close-up of subject then wide establishing over-the-shoulder
shot.camera_motion: steadicam tracking push-in to owner, smooth dolly-out to wide, subtle rack-focus to phone screen

subject.description: Character description says: صاحب متجر سعودي مبتسم، عمره 30-45، بنية متوسطة، لحية قصيرة، شعر مرتب، حركات يدوية وودودة.
subject.wardrobe: قميص قطني أخضر فاتح، مئزر متجر بني قماشي، ساعة معصم بسيطة، خاتم فضي، أقمشة غير لامعة
subject.mic_position: lav mic on lapel left, boom overhead for wide, phone internal mic for close-up

scene.location: محل تجزئة صغير في السعودية, رفوف خشبية ممتلئة بمنتجات محلية, عصري-حقيقي, نهار داخلي مع إضاءة متجر دافئة
scene.environment: لوحة أسعار صغيرة، لافتة خلف الكاونتر، صندوق تسجيل المبيعات، زجاج واجهة بلمسات ضوئية، عملاء متفرّقون في الخلفية

visual_details: action 1: places smartphone on counter, smiles and taps app, eyes focused; micro-gesture: nods satisfied; camera: medium close-up, slight dolly-in to phone screen
action 2: quickly scans product label, types price and photo, thumbs swipe; facial expression: confident, playful eyebrow raise; camera: over-the-shoulder top-down to UI, rack-focus to product
action 3: receives WhatsApp order notification, glances up and waves to customer, taps accept and types reply; expression: warm and efficient; camera: dolly-out to wide showing store bustle

cinematography.lighting: key: soft warm LED from front-left, fill: gentle bounce from right, practicals: hanging filament bulbs, time-of-day: late morning, slight backlight rim for separation

audio.ambient: soft store hum, distant street traffic, occasional footstep, faint product rustle, phone notification ping (distinct WhatsApp tone)

talk: Owner: Adding product to Taklefa app, quick and done!

prohibited_elements: no visible brand logos beyond store name
no on-screen UI overlays except the app UI being demonstrated
no explicit personal data on-screen (blur receipts if present)
